text.title: E2E Framework Migration — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the migration tracker + per-wave record shape. Migration lead or agent producing artifacts must satisfy these contracts.

forbidden.pattern: waves array missing the Decommission wave (r5)
cutover wave started without parity gate passed (r1)
dual_window.planned_end_date null OR > 6 months after start (r3)
module marked "complete" without codemod_applied OR documented manual rationale (r2)
wave entered without rollback_drill_records for the prior wave (r4)
migration marked complete with old framework still imported anywhere in codebase (r5)
wave.exit_criteria empty or "TBD" — every wave must have explicit exit criteria

allowed-transformations.transformation: Split a wave into sub-waves when scope is unexpectedly large (e.g., Wave 2a / 2b) — but the parent wave's exit criteria still apply.
Extend planned_end_date for a dual-window with documented justification + new explicit end date (NOT open-ended).
Document a module as "skipped with rationale" if it will not migrate (e.g., legacy feature being retired in parallel) — counts toward Wave 4 completion as long as it's removed from the codebase.

section.title: Self-check (run before declaring a wave complete)

list.item: Wave entry_criteria were met before start_date (r-applicable)
Wave exit_criteria are all true at completed_date
If wave is Cutover, parity gate passed (r1)
If wave is ParallelBuild, dual_window has explicit end date (r3)
If wave is Decommission, codebase grep returns zero imports of old framework (r5)
